description: A production-ready, extensible, LLM-agnostic storytelling engine with advanced character AI that allows users to build, extend, and retell interactive stories through structured folders, dynamic memory, character-driven logic, and local/API LLM integration. Features complete character consistency, emotional stability, intelligent response generation, and plugin-based extensibility.
goals: Support modular storypack structure (characters, world, items, meta, style, config)
Enable multi-model integration using both local (Ollama) and remote (OpenAI, Groq, Claude) LLMs
Allow story state continuity across interactions with rollback and snapshot support
Support style-guided storytelling and configurable tone via per-story style guides
Enable immersive character memory and voice modeling, unique per character
Support token-efficient prompt construction and fallback routing between models
Expose OpenChronicle functions through CLI, Discord bot, and web UI
Support converter scripts to package/unpack storypacks and build from raw notes
Maintain LLM abstraction so any compliant model can be plugged in
Keep system compatible with low-resource hardware (NAS, Pi, etc.)
core_modules: scene_logger.py → logs scene_id, user/model input, memory state, flags, canon used
story_loader.py → loads storypacks (canon, memory, characters, meta.yaml, style)
context_builder.py → builds prompts using memory + canon + analysis + user input
content_analyzer.py → uses LLM to classify tone, flags, route models
memory_manager.py → stores/retrieves world state, character status, etc
database.py → story-local SQLite persistence with rollback and memory tracking
model_adapter.py → abstraction for different LLM providers (OpenAI, Ollama, mock)
rollback_engine.py → complete rollback system with backup and integrity validation
search_engine.py → full-text search with FTS5, caching, and advanced queries
bookmark_manager.py → comprehensive bookmark system with metadata and navigation
timeline_builder.py → timeline generation with scene and bookmark integration
character_style_manager.py → character consistency management across models
token_manager.py → intelligent token management and optimization
character_consistency_engine.py → motivation anchoring, trait locking, behavioral auditing
emotional_stability_engine.py → gratification loop prevention, emotional cooldowns
character_interaction_engine.py → multi-character scenes, relationship dynamics
character_stat_engine.py → RPG-style character traits and progression
narrative_dice_engine.py → story-driven success/failure resolution system
memory_consistency_engine.py → persistent character memory with validation
intelligent_response_engine.py → adaptive response strategies and quality optimization
design_principles: Modular architecture with clean separation of concerns
Memory versioning and comprehensive rollback support
Scene tracking and timeline export capabilities

project_structure.core: 20 foundational Python modules including 7 advanced character AI engines
project_structure.storypacks: Per-story folders with canon, characters, memory, and style guides (JSON format)
project_structure.templates: Comprehensive JSON templates for creating new storypacks
project_structure.storage: SQLite databases per story, with exports and backups folders

emotional_profile.emotional_cooldown: Number of turns before character can reuse same emotional response
emotional_profile.boundaries_enabled: Boolean: whether character can resist advances or say no
emotional_profile.needs_attention: Boolean: whether character seeks validation when ignored

character_stats.charisma: Social influence and natural likability (0-10 scale)
character_stats.willpower: Resistance to temptation and mental fortitude (0-10 scale)
character_stats.humor: Wit, comedic timing, and levity (0-10 scale)
character_stats.courage: Bravery in dangerous or challenging situations (0-10 scale)
character_stats.loyalty: Commitment to relationships and causes (0-10 scale)
character_stats.greed: Desire for wealth, power, or material gain (0-10 scale)

architecture_highlights: LLM Support: 12+ providers with unified interface (see config/models.json)
Advanced Content Analysis: Hybrid transformer + keyword approach with DistilBERT, toxic-bert, and emotion models
Dynamic Model Routing: Content-aware routing with confidence thresholds and NSFW-safe fallbacks
Flexible deployment: Docker (with optional Ollama), local development, or cloud
Optional two-tier LLM system: Local LLM (analysis) + Main LLM (generation)
Each story gets its own SQLite database at storage/{story_id}/openchronicle.db
Tables: scenes, memory, memory_history, rollback_points, rollback_backups, bookmarks, scenes_fts, memory_fts
Static content (canon, characters) remains in YAML/text files
Dynamic data (scenes, memory, rollback, bookmarks, search indexes) stored in SQLite
Model adapters configured via config/models.json with extensive provider support
Intelligent content analysis with transformer-based classification and routing
Centralized logging system with utilities for maintenance and monitoring
Graceful degradation from transformer to keyword-only analysis when needed
testing_status: Comprehensive test suite: 127 tests with 126 passing, 1 skipped (99.2% success rate). All core modules fully tested including transformer-based content analysis. Search engine functionality operational. Windows compatibility validated.

completed_systems.title: TRANSFORMER-BASED CONTENT ANALYSIS SYSTEM
details: ✅ Implemented hybrid content classification using keyword + transformer approaches
✅ Integrated DistilBERT for sentiment analysis with cardiffnlp/twitter-roberta-base-sentiment-latest
✅ Added toxic content detection using unitary/toxic-bert model
✅ Implemented emotion detection with j-hartmann/emotion-english-distilroberta-base
✅ Created confidence weighting system (60% transformer, 40% keyword for final decisions)
✅ Added false positive reduction for fantasy/gaming content and question patterns
✅ Implemented dynamic model routing based on content analysis with NSFW-safe fallbacks
✅ Added comprehensive logging of routing decisions and analysis confidence
✅ Created graceful fallback to keyword-only analysis when transformers unavailable
✅ All 12 transformer-specific tests passing with comprehensive coverage
